description: Mutation catalog. Each entry injects a specific fault into a rule's verification subject; the rule's primary verifier MUST catch it (counterexample or failing property). `dspec mutation` runs the whole catalog and exits non-zero if any mutant survives.

mutations.name: drop-debit-line
mutations.fault: one debit line excluded from the debit total

mutations.name: drop-closed-guard
mutations.fault: closed-period guard removed from all mutations

mutations.name: drop-period-tenant
mutations.fault: tenant comparison removed for period only

mutations.name: drop-sync-tenant
mutations.fault: tenant comparison removed for sync only
